jd_text: Group Chief Information Officer (Confidential) Dubai - Global Talent Welcome We are supporting a leading UAE-based enterprise group in the appointment of a Group CIO to lead technology strategy and execution across a large, multi-business environment. The Role Reporting to the executive leadership team, you will define and deliver the group’s end-to-end technology vision—driving transformation, modernisation, and a fully integrated, customer-centric ecosystem. You will oversee enterprise platforms, digital products, data, infrastructure, and cybersecurity, while leading large, distributed teams and complex programmes. Key Focus Areas Group-wide technology and digital strategy Enterprise transformation and platform modernisation Customer-facing technology and unified experience Data, cloud, and cybersecurity leadership IT governance, scale, and operational excellence Profile Proven CIO / senior technology leadership experience in a complex organisation Track record delivering large-scale transformation Strong exposure to customer-centric digital ecosystems Commercial mindset with executive stakeholder influence Experience in large, multi-entity or asset-heavy environments is advantageous Next Steps This is a confidential mandate. Further detail will be shared with selected candidates. Apply or get in touch for a discreet discussion.
